## Setup Stage

- [ ] Initial installation / clone
- [ ] Backend setup (.NET)
- [ ] Frontend setup (Angular, npm)
- [ ] Running locally (both backend & frontend)
- [ ] Database configuration
- [ ] OBS setup (browser sources)
- [ ] Deployment to production
- [ ] Other: ****\_****

## Environment

**Machine:**

- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- .NET Version (if applicable): [e.g., 9.0]
- Node.js Version (if applicable): [e.g., 20.0]
- npm Version (if applicable): [e.g., 10.0]

**Development Tools:**

- IDE: [e.g., Visual Studio 2022, VS Code]
- Git version: [e.g., 2.40]
- OBS Version (if applicable): [e.g., 30.1]
